heading: Who may convene military commissions
label: 948h Who may convene military commissions
text: Military commissions under this chapter may be convened by the Secretary of Defense or by any officer or official of the United States designated by the Secretary for that purpose.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 948h, added , , , related to who may convene military commissions, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 109–366, § 3(a)(1)120 Stat. 2603Pub. L. 111–84Oct. 17, 2006
